problem_text_cn: 光滑水平面上有质量M、半径R的圆环，质量m(m<M)的质点在环内壁无摩擦滑动。初始时圆环静止，质点在(0,R)处，速度沿x方向大小为v₀。1. 证明质点不会离开环内壁；2. 导出质点运动方程；3. 求轨迹转折处的曲率半径。
problem_text_en: On a smooth horizontal surface, there is a circular ring of mass M and radius R. A particle of mass m(m<M) can slide frictionlessly on the inner wall of the ring. Initially, the ring is at rest, the particle is at (0,R), and its velocity is along the x-direction with magnitude v₀. 1. Prove that the particle will not leave the inner wall of the ring；2. Derive the motion equation of the particle；3. Find the radius of curvature at the turning points of the trajectory.
problem_solution_cn: （1）质点不脱离证明：- 系统质心速度v_C=mv₀/(M+m)，质心系中质点和环心绕C作匀速圆周运动，向心力由环的支持力提供，故质点不脱离。（2）运动方程：- 地面坐标系中，x=(mv₀t + MRsinωt)/(M+m)，y=R(m + Mcosωt)/(M+m)，其中ω=v₀/R。（3）曲率半径：- A₁点（最高处）ρ₁=(M+m)R/M；A₂点（最低处）ρ₂=(M-m)²R/[M(M+m)]；A₃点（水平转折处）ρ₃=√[(M-m)/(M+m)]R。
problem_solution_en: （1）Proof of particle not detaching：- The velocity of the system's center of mass v_C=mv₀/(M+m). In the center-of-mass frame, the particle and the ring center move in uniform circular motion around C, with the centripetal force provided by the ring's support force, so the particle does not detach。（2）Motion equation：- In the ground coordinate system, x=(mv₀t + MRsinωt)/(M+m)，y=R(m + Mcosωt)/(M+m)，where ω=v₀/R。（3）Radius of curvature：- Point A₁（highest point）ρ₁=(M+m)R/M；Point A₂（lowest point）ρ₂=(M-m)²R/[M(M+m)]；Point A₃（horizontal turning point）ρ₃=√[(M-m)/(M+m)]R。
problem_answer: 1. 证明见解析；2. 运动方程$x= rac{mv_0 t + MR\sin\omega t}{M+m}{$}，$y= rac{R(m + M\cos\omega t)}{M+m}{$}（ω=v₀/R）；3. 曲率半径分别为$ho_1= rac{M+m}{M}{R}$、$ho_2= rac{(M-m)^2 R}{M(M+m)}{$}、$ho_3=\sqrt{ rac{M-m}{M+m}{}}R$
